chapter_title.en: The Prayer for Eclipses, Earthquakes, Winds, and Oppression and Their Causes

text: 1520 - وَقَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ: «لاَ تَسُبُّوا اَلرِّيَاحَ فَإِنَّهَا مَأْمُورَةٌ وَ لاَ اَلْجِبَالَ وَ لاَ اَلسَّاعَاتِ وَ لاَ اَلْأَيَّامَ وَ لاَ اَللَّيَالِيَ فَتَأْثَمُوا وَ يَرْجِعَ إِلَيْكُمْ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1520 - The Messenger of Allah (sw) said:
"Do not curse the winds, for they are commanded (by Allah (swt)), nor the mountains, nor the hours, nor the days, nor the nights, lest you commit a sin and it returns to you."
